rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes referencing visible ports
generic_rules: Guard previous-value comparisons with an initialized boolean flag
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE
Declare visible identifiers before referencing them in AGREE annexes
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names directly as AGREE variables
Avoid placing AGREE clauses outside valid component type or implementation scopes
